title: Fit test - Failing the fit test
scenario: Fit Test displays incorrect seal status (green Good vs yellow Fail) for Poly Voyager Free 60/60+ and Voyager Free 20 true wireless earbuds
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the Poly Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20 earbuds are connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
4. Locate and tap the Fit Test option (may be under Audio Settings or a dedicated section).
5. Place the earbuds properly in both ears (for a good fit test scenario).
6. Tap the Start or Run button to initiate the fit test.
7. Observe the visual feedback on screen after the test completes.
8. Repeat steps 5–7 but this time place the earbuds on a table or otherwise simulate a poor fit (e.g., not fully seated in ears).
9. Tap the Start or Run button again to initiate the fit test with poor fit.
10. Observe the visual feedback on screen after the test completes.
11. Tap the Cancel button (if available) during or after the test.
12. Verify the app navigates back to the Device Home Screen or Onboarding screen.
expected: - For proper fit: Green "Good" icon is displayed with appropriate messaging, and Retry/Cancel buttons are available.\n- For poor fit: Yellow "Fail" icon is displayed with appropriate messaging, and Retry/Cancel buttons are available.\n- Tapping Cancel returns the user to the Device Home Screen or Onboarding screen.
